prose: The Fukui reactivity analysis on benzaldehyde was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level with tier 'standard' in the gas phase. The electronegativity indices indicate the most nucleophilic site on the oxygen atom (index 1) with an F− value of 0.23839906, and the most electrophilic site on the carbon atom (index 2) with an F+ value of 0.39938965. The dual descriptor suggests sites of simultaneous electrophilic and nucleophilic character. Warnings during the calculation indicate some charge conservation drift, but the overall trustworthiness is confirmed.
